title: Chinese Exclusion Act
description: First major law restricting immigration based on nationality, banning Chinese laborers.

title: National Origins Act
description: Established strict national-origin quotas that heavily favored Northern and Western Europe.

title: Immigration and Nationality Act of 1952
description: Maintained quota system but eliminated race-based barriers to naturalization.

title: Immigration and Nationality Act of 1965
description: Ended national-origin quotas, opening pathways for family reunification and skilled workers from Asia, Africa, and Latin America.

title: Immigration Reform and Control Act
description: Granted amnesty to millions while strengthening border enforcement.

title: Immigration Act of 1990
description: Raised overall immigration caps and created diversity visa program.
